desires: Stay with Mina and Jae right now because being alone feels worse than failing the midterm tomorrow
Ignore the laundry and study tasks to avoid the stress of isolation
Assert my need for immediate connection over any future consequences like sleep debt or grades

goals.description: Text Mina and Jae immediately: 'I'm leaving the house in 5 mins, meet me at the club. No studying, no laundry, just us.' Do not wait for a reply.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) overrides everything; isolation feels like a threat. My impulsive nature demands immediate action to secure social validation. I need to assertively command the situation because waiting for others to respond creates anxiety.

goals.description: Send a blunt text to Professor Assignment: 'Can't make it tonight, too drained. We'll talk later.' Then immediately lock my phone away.
goals.rationale: I need to set a hard boundary to stop the academic pressure from bleeding into my social time. Directness is my conflict style; I don't want to negotiate or explain, just close the loop so I can focus entirely on the crew without guilt.

goals.description: Ignore all remaining tasks (laundry, exam prep, sleep debt) until I physically collapse or wake up tomorrow.
goals.rationale: Short planning horizon means tomorrow's consequences are irrelevant right now. My procrastination bias is working perfectly: if I ignore it, it won't hurt me... yet. The immediate dopamine of being with my friends outweighs the risk of a bad grade or dirty clothes.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances my top affiliation value (0.5) by immediately securing social validation with Mina and Jae. Assertively commands the situation to stop isolation anxiety. goals.rationale: I need to assertively set boundaries regarding my choices. While I could just ghost the study plan, explicitly stating my values aligns with my high assertiveness score, even if it's a bit dramatic.
